name: kengitech-api
description: Backend API for KengiTech POS System

scripts.build: npx prisma generate && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema-store.prisma && npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/index.js --packages=external --format=cjs
scripts.postinstall: npx prisma generate && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema-store.prisma
scripts.db:generate: npx prisma generate && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema-store.prisma
scripts.db:push:all: npx prisma db push && npx prisma db push --schema=prisma/schema-store.prisma
scripts.db:reset: npx prisma db push --force-reset && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
